##NAMES=Gotzenite
##RRUFFID=R140781
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_4_NaCa_2_Ti(Si_2_O_7_)_2_(OF)F_2_
##LOCALITY=Parco Chigi, Ariccia, Alban Hills, Rome Province, Latium, Italy
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Prismatic pale-yellow crystals, associated with colorless sanidine.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140781
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Na_1.00_(Ca_5.00_Na_0.36_Ce_0.19_La_0.12_Sr_0.09_Mn_0.04_Fe_0.03_Nd^3+^_0.02_Pr_0.01_Dy_0.01_)(Ti_0.86_Nd^5+^_0.09_Zr_0.06_Th_0.02_)(Si_2.02_O_7_)_2_OF_2.98_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
